reportable_type.description: Polymorphic type of the model being reported.

reportable_id.description: Unique identifier of the user or listing.

items.description: Allowed types: image/jpeg, image/png. Max size: 5MB.

evidence_images.description: Attach up to 3 visual proofs of the violation.

parameters.name: method
